trivia_bullets.text: Aspect of Lamprey is one of two 'Aspect of' named Aura enchantments in Theros Beyond Death, alongside Aspect of Manticore (red, {2}{R}, Flash, first strike + +2/+0). The 'Aspect of X' naming convention predates THB — Aspect of Wolf (Alpha), Aspect of Mongoose (Time Spiral), Aspect of Gorgon (Journey into Nyx) — but these are not a coordinated multi-color cycle; the name is used independently across sets for Auras channeling a creature's bestial quality.
sources: Scryfall: Aspect of Gorgon Journey into Nyx 2014

trivia_bullets.text: "Some aspire to be mighty like the lion or the hydra. I am the parasite that feeds on them all." — unnamed speaker. Positions parasitism as a superior predatory strategy: the lamprey feeds on apex predators by attaching, not competing. Maps onto the mechanics: lifelink (feeding) + forced discard on ETB (stripping resources rather than engaging in direct power confrontation).

At {3}{B}: on entry, target opponent discards two cards; enchanted creature gains lifelink. EDHREC rank 17032 — among the least-played cards in Commander. Niche use in dedicated discard/drain builds or decks that recur Aura ETB triggers.

THB is heavily built around Constellation (triggers when an enchantment enters under your control). Aspect of Lamprey slots into that ecosystem as both an Aura and a Constellation-trigger enabler, making it marginally more useful in dedicated enchantment-matters decks than its raw power level suggests.

related_cards.name: Aspect of Manticore
related_cards.note: the only other 'Aspect of' Aura in THB; red, Flash, grants first strike
